{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Tiberian's Remnant
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] would be vulnerable to pressure from [[Tiberian's Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Tiberian's Remnant]] stated that storms and spears are not known for healing powers.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
